title: Billing Requirements Document Dataset
summary: Benchmark slice for changes where product, pricing, and governance documents must be present before implementation context is considered good enough.

documents.title: Product Requirements Document
documents.reason: Defines product scope and target buyer needs.

documents.title: Go-to-Market Pricing
documents.reason: Billing and ROI copy must stay aligned with pricing intent.

documents.title: Enterprise Platform
documents.reason: Portal, admin, RBAC, and billing boundaries are described here.

reuse_targets.title: Portal billing snapshot
reuse_targets.reason: Customer-facing billing UI should be extended instead of duplicated.

reuse_targets.title: Admin billing operations
reuse_targets.reason: Internal billing posture belongs in admin, not portal.

reuse_targets.title: Tenant-scoped portal contracts
reuse_targets.reason: Billing and docs status must remain tenant-scoped.

policy_targets: Do not expose billing secrets or payment tokens in UI payloads.
Keep portal and admin billing responsibilities separate.
Do not make unsupported ROI or compliance claims.
